portalConfig.guidelines:
1. Please keep a scanned copy of the birth certificate ready.
2. Recent passport-sized photograph is required.
3. Admission fee is non-refundable.

homework.title: Algebra Chapter 1 Exercises
homework.description: Complete all exercises from page 15 to 20.

homework.title: Essay on Environment
homework.description: Write a 500-word essay on environmental pollution and prevention.

homework.title: Physics Lab Report
homework.description: Submit the lab report for the pendulum experiment.

homework.title: History Assignment: Mughal Empire
homework.description: Prepare a presentation on the rise and fall of the Mughal Empire.
